_readme: Edit this file to update tasks. status: 'todo' | 'in-progress' | 'done'. priority: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'. due: YYYY-MM-DD.

tasks.title: Deploy Friday Dashboard to Vercel
tasks.description: Fix Git PATH on machine, push to GitHub, deploy to Vercel, install as PWA on iPhone

tasks.title: Add Portal logo to Friday email signature
tasks.description: Host logo on Vercel once deployed, update HTML email sig

tasks.title: Restrict Friday Azure app to friday@ mailbox only
tasks.description: Run New-ApplicationAccessPolicy via ExchangeOnlineManagement PowerShell module on computer

tasks.title: Portal Tender Tool — Quantity Measurement Agent
tasks.description: PENDING GREEN LIGHT. Build a tender agent with PDF drawing measurement capability. Vision model reads drawings, detects scale, measures areas/lengths/depths. Outputs quantities table. Agent applies rates and generates tender document. Need: sample drawing, rate schedule, sample tender doc from Adrian.

tasks.title: Portal Project Manager App
tasks.description: Web app version of Excalibur spreadsheet. Program builder, live actuals, material tracking, truck tracking, daily logs. Mobile-first for on-site use.

tasks.title: OHS/QA Agent — NEXT PROJECT
tasks.description: PENDING — OHS Agent to build out. Full scope written in /workspace/projects/OHS-QA-Agent-Scope.md. 6 modules: 1) Project commencement pack (SWMS, truck routes, toolboxes) 2) HammerTech/client portal integration 3) Weekly toolbox + daily prestart app 4) Machine hours + service tracking 5) Incident reporting 6) QA photo submission + document lodgement. 3-4 week build across 3 phases.

tasks.title: Give Friday read access to Outlook Calendar
tasks.description: Add Calendars.Read (Application permission) to Friday Mail Azure app. Grant admin consent. Then Friday can read Adrian@portalcontractors.com calendar directly for briefings and scheduling.

tasks.title: Give Friday read access to Google Calendar
tasks.description: Set up Google Calendar API access via Google Cloud Console using adrian.bucca@gmail.com. OAuth2 or service account. Friday can then read personal Google Calendar for full schedule visibility.

tasks.title: Set up Groq API
tasks.description: Sign up at console.groq.com (free), create API key, add to OpenClaw as fallback model after Gemini. Groq runs Llama 3 — insanely fast and free.

tasks.title: Top up Anthropic Claude credits
tasks.description: Claude API ran out of credits. Top up for complex coding/analysis tasks.
